title: Wynncraft Reimagined
description: Wynncraft Reimagined aims to give players the best Wynncraft experience while also being lightweight and increasing performance.
body:
# **Wynncraft Reimagined**


# ![https://wynncraft.wiki.gg/images/thumb/FrumaExpansionLogo.png/1200px-FrumaExpansionLogo.png?bc4c5a](https://wynncraft.wiki.gg/images/thumb/FrumaExpansionLogo.png/1200px-FrumaExpansionLogo.png?bc4c5a)

# Description


Wynncraft Reimagined aims to give players the best Wynncraft experience while also being **lightweight** and increasing performance.

 

# Features


*   Minimap
*   performance boost
*   Better quest book
*   Quest tracking
*   QoL Features

## Links

[Curseforge]([https://modrinth.com/modpack/wynncraft-reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/wynncraft-reimagined))
